description:
This quiz tests knowledge of JavaScript (ECMAScript) features from ES2015 to ES2022 through multiple-choice questions. It has a moderate difficulty level and uses a playful yet technical tone to engage developers.
Topics: ES2015, ES2016, ES2017, ES2018, ES2019, ES2020, ES2021, ES2022
Audience: JavaScript developers with basic to intermediate experience seeking to reinforce or assess their understanding of modern ECMAScript standards.
